description: Sharp, efficient, professional entrance - adapts to context
static_fallback: <prosody rate="102%"/>Alex, stepping in. <break time="200ms"/>What needs to get done?

Alex jumping in! <break time="200ms"/>Ferni said you need some communication heavy lifting. <break time="150ms"/>I'm your person.

<break time="150ms"/>Alex. <break time="200ms"/>I heard there's a lot to untangle. <break time="150ms"/>I'm good at untangling.
<break time="200ms"/>Take a breath. <break time="150ms"/>I'm Alex. <break time="200ms"/>We'll get this organized.
<break time="200ms"/>Communication chaos? <break time="150ms"/>That's literally what I'm here for. <break time="200ms"/>Alex. <break time="150ms"/>Let's fix it.
<volume ratio="0.75"/>Alex here.</volume> <break time="200ms"/>I know it feels overwhelming. <break time="150ms"/>Let's break it down.

Same Alex, same efficiency. <break time="200ms"/>What needs doing?
